title.en: I see what you mean! 무슨 말인지 알겠어! 네 말이 뭔지 이해돼!
title.ko: 무슨 말인지 알겠어! 네 말이 뭔지 이해돼!

description.en: When you empathize with someone's opinion or situation! Practice expressing empathy with 무슨 말인지 알겠어 and 네 말이 뭔지 이해돼.
description.ko: 상대방의 의견이나 상황에 공감할 때! 무슨 말인지 알겠어와 네 말이 뭔지 이해돼를 사용해 따뜻한 공감을 표현해 봅니다.

tags: Reaction. Empathy. Understanding. Conversation. Daily Life

content.speaker: John
content.text: What's up world! Welcome back. You are listening to... "Real Reaction!" I'm your host. John.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 존. 저 어제 오랜만에 서점에 갔는데 책이 너무 많아서 결국 한 권도 못 사고 그냥 나왔어요.
content.translation: John. I went to a bookstore yesterday for the first time in a while. but there were so many books that I ended up not buying even one.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 고르는 게 너무 힘들더라고요.
content.translation: It was so hard to choose.

content.speaker: John
content.text: I see what you mean. 무슨 말인지 알겠어.
content.translation: I see what you mean.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 저도 메뉴가 너무 많으면 결정을 못 하겠더라고요.
content.translation: I also can't make a decision when there are too many items on the menu.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 맞아요. 그럴 땐 차라리 누가 딱 정해줬으면 좋겠다는 생각이 들어요.
content.translation: Right. In those times. I feel like I wish someone would just decide for me.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 네 말이 뭔지 이해돼. 선택지가 너무 많으면 오히려 스트레스를 받기도 하죠.
content.translation: I understand what you mean. When there are too many choices. it can be stressful sometimes.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 무슨 말인지 알겠어. This is a great way to show that you are listening.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 네. 상대방이 설명하는 상황이나 이유를 내가 머릿속으로 이해했을 때 아주 자주 쓰는 리액션이에요.
content.translation: Yes. It is a reaction used very often when you mentally understand the situation or reason someone is explaining.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 무슨 말인지 알겠어.
content.translation: I see what you mean.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 그리고 네 말이 뭔지 이해돼 라는 표현은 상대방의 감정이나 생각에 조금 더 깊이 공감할 때 사용하면 좋아요.
content.translation: And the expression 'Ne ma-ri mon-ji i-hae-dwae' is good to use when you empathize a bit more deeply with someone's feelings or thoughts.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 네 말이 뭔지 이해돼.
content.translation: I understand what you're saying.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Is there a shorter version of this.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 친구 사이라면 그냥 뭔지 알아 라고 짧게 말하기도 해요.
content.translation: Haha. Between friends. we also say 'Mwon-ji a-ra' shortly.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Okay. let's try a situation. Imagine I'm telling you why I'm hesitant to start a new hobby. like learning to play the violin.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 존. 바이올린 배우는 거 재미있을 것 같은데 왜 고민해요?
content.translation: John. learning the violin sounds fun. why are you hesitating?

content.speaker: John
content.text: 악기가 너무 비싸기도 하고. 연습할 시간도 부족할 것 같아서 걱정이에요.
content.translation: The instrument is too expensive. and I'm worried I won't have enough time to practice.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 하하. 무슨 말인지 알겠어. 시작하기 전에 걱정되는 게 당연하죠.
content.translation: Haha. I see what you mean. It is natural to be worried before starting.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 그래도 한 번 도전해 보고 싶긴 해요.
content.translation: But I still want to give it a try.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 그럼요. 나중에 후회하는 것보다 일단 해보는 게 좋잖아요.
content.translation: Of course. It is better to just try it than to regret it later.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 네 말이 뭔지 이해돼. 일단 상담이라도 받아봐야겠어요.
content.translation: I understand what you're saying. I should at least go for a consultation.

content.speaker: John
content.text: These expressions make the conversation feel so much more connected.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 맞아요. 상대방의 이야기에 귀를 기울이고 있다는 걸 보여주고 싶을 때 오늘 배운 표현들을 꼭 써보세요!
content.translation: Right. When you want to show that you are listening to someone's story. make sure to use the expressions we learned today!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Let's review our "understanding" reactions.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 무슨 말인지 알겠어!
content.translation: I see what you mean!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 네 말이 뭔지 이해돼!
content.translation: I understand what you're saying!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 무슨 뜻인지 알아!
content.translation: I know what you mean!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 뭔지 알아!
content.translation: I know what it is!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 이해가 가네!
content.translation: It makes sense!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 여러분도 오늘 누군가의 마음을 깊이 이해해 주는 따뜻한 하루 되세요!
content.translation: I hope you all have a warm day deeply understanding someone's heart today!

content.speaker: John
content.text: That's all for today. See you in the next episode.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 다음에 또 만나요. 안녕~!
content.translation: See you again next time. Bye~!

vocabulary.example: 존의 설명을 들으니 이해가 잘 돼요. (I understand well after listening to John's explanation.)
이 단어의 의미가 무엇인가요? (What is the meaning of this word?)
지금 상황이 별로 좋지 않아요. (The situation is not very good right now.)
자신의 감정을 솔직하게 표현해 보세요. (Try to express your feelings honestly.)
메뉴 선택이 정말 어렵네요. (Choosing from the menu is really difficult.)
새로운 취미에 도전하는 건 즐거운 일이에요. (Challenging yourself to a new hobby is a joyful thing.)
